allow: Bash(python3 -c " import re from pathlib import Path root = Path\('modules/chartAPI'\) files = [] for f in sorted\(root.rglob\('*.adoc'\)\): text = f.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\) count = sum\(1 for line in text.splitlines\(\) if re.match\(r'^\\s*image:', line\) and 'alt=' not in line\) if count: files.append\(str\(f\)\) n = len\(files\) batch = n // 6 for i in range\(6\): start = i * batch end = \(i+1\)*batch if i < 5 else n print\(repr\(files[start:end]\)\) ")
